name: Akamai WAF
description: The WAF API allows you to manage a common set of lists for use in various Akamai security products such as Kona Site Defender, Web App Protector, and Bot Manager

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Only list items that match the specified substring in any network list's name or list of items

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: When enabled, provides additional response data (Default: false)

parameters.name: includeelements
parameters.description: If enabled, the response list includes all items (Default: false)

actions.name: Get Network
actions.description: Gets a network list's most recent syncPoint version

parameters.name: networklistid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for each network list. Comma-separated list is allowed

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: When enabled, provides additional response data (Default: false)

parameters.name: includeelements
parameters.description: If enabled, the response list includes all items (Default: false)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name for the new network list

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the new network list

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of the new network list

parameters.name: list
parameters.description: IP(s) for the new network list. Comma-separated list is allowed

parameters.name: networklistid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the network list

actions.name: Update Network
actions.description: Update the network list items and properties

parameters.name: networklistid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for each network list

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Update or change the name of the network list

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Update or change the description of the network list

actions.name: Add Element
actions.description: Adds the specified element(s) to a list

parameters.name: networklistid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the network list

parameters.name: elements
parameters.description: Element(s) to add to the network list. Comma-separated list is allowed

actions.name: Remove Element
actions.description: Remove the specified element(s) from the list

parameters.name: networklistid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the network list

parameters.name: elements
parameters.description: Element(s) to be removed from the network list. Comma-separated list is allowed

actions.name: Activate Network
actions.description: Activate the most recent syncPoint version of a network list in either the STAGING or PRODUCTION environment

parameters.name: networklistid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the network list

parameters.name: environment
parameters.description: Environment to activate the network (Default: STAGING)

parameters.name: comments
parameters.description: Comments to add to the network

parameters.name: notification
parameters.description: Notification Recipients for the network list. Comma-separated list is allowed

actions.name: Activation Status
actions.description: Shows a network list activation status on either the STAGING or PRODUCTION environment

parameters.name: networklistid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the network list

parameters.name: environment
parameters.description: The environment in which the list activation occurs (Default: STAGING)

actions.name: Activation Snapshot
actions.description: Gets a version of a network list

parameters.name: networklistid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the network list

parameters.name: syncpoint
parameters.description: The network list version for which to retrieve the snapshot

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: When enabled, provides additional response data (Default: false)

actions.name: Activation Details
actions.description: Provides detailed status for a given activation

parameters.name: activationid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the network list

actions.name: List Siteshields
actions.description: Get akamai site shields ip ranges
